title: crepidiastrum koshunense var. taiwanianum
intro: Crepidiastrum koshunense var. taiwanianum, also known as Taiwan Crepidiastrum, is a rare and unique plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is native to Taiwan and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting digestion. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
